nodes.label: core/ghost/mutations.py — Phase 4-G4: semantic mutation library.  Each Mutation
Try to parse the step's request body as JSON. Returns None if     not JSON-shape
Serialize parsed JSON back onto step.request_body.
Return url with `?key=` set to new_value, or removed if None.
Split a JWT into (header_b64, payload_b64, signature_b64). Returns     None if t
Best-effort decode of a JWT header. Returns None on any failure.
URL-safe base64 with padding stripped — standard JWT form.
Replace the JWT in `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` with one using     `alg: none`
Remove the `state` query parameter from an OAuth/OIDC step.      Tests OAuth CSR
Flip role / is_admin / permission fields in the request body.      Mass-assignme
Flip numeric quantity/price/amount fields to a negative value.      Tests intege
Inject trust-boundary spoofing headers (X-Forwarded-For,     X-Real-IP, X-Origin
Change the HTTP method (GET → POST, POST → PUT, etc.).      Tests endpoint-routi
Remove CSRF tokens from headers and body.      Tests endpoints that have CSRF mi
Resolve a label to a fresh Mutation instance, or None if unknown.
Suggested mutation: step index + mutation instance + rationale.      The propose
Inspect every step of `flow` and return mutation proposals.      For each step,
